dc:title: Loaded touring bicycle beside a rural roadside field
dc:description: A color photograph shows a loaded touring bicycle leaning against a metal roadside guardrail. The bicycle has drop handlebars, a front-mounted silver sleeping pad or roll, multiple water bottles, and large rear panniers secured with straps and cords. The brand name “TREK” is visible on the bicycle frame. Behind the guardrail is a dry golden agricultural field with rolling hills, scrub-covered mounds, and distant low ridgelines under a broad blue sky with light clouds. The scene suggests a rural roadside stop in an arid or late-season farming landscape.
